# Reference
## Inlined
<details><summary><code>client.inlined.<a href="src/fern/inlined/client.py">search</a>(...)</code></summary>
<dl>
<dd>

#### 🔌 Usage

<dl>
<dd>

<dl>
<dd>

```python
from fern import FernApi

client = FernApi(
    token="YOUR_TOKEN",
    base_url="https://yourhost.com/path/to/api",
)
client.inlined.search(
    query="query",
)

```
</dd>
</dl>
</dd>
</dl>

#### ⚙️ Parameters

<dl>
<dd>

<dl>
<dd>

**query:** `str` 
    
</dd>
</dl>

<dl>
<dd>

**limit:** `typing.Optional[int]` 
    
</dd>
</dl>

<dl>
<dd>

**filter:** `typing.Optional[InlinedSearchRequestFilter]` 
    
</dd>
</dl>

<dl>
<dd>

**request_options:** `typing.Optional[RequestOptions]` — Request-specific configuration.
    
</dd>
</dl>
</dd>
</dl>


</dd>
</dl>
</details>

<details><summary><code>client.inlined.<a href="src/fern/inlined/client.py">index</a>(...)</code></summary>
<dl>
<dd>

#### 🔌 Usage

<dl>
<dd>

<dl>
<dd>

```python
from fern import FernApi, SearchResult

client = FernApi(
    token="YOUR_TOKEN",
    base_url="https://yourhost.com/path/to/api",
)
client.inlined.index(
    document=SearchResult(
        id="id",
        score=1.1,
    ),
)

```
</dd>
</dl>
</dd>
</dl>

#### ⚙️ Parameters

<dl>
<dd>

<dl>
<dd>

**document:** `SearchResult` 
    
</dd>
</dl>

<dl>
<dd>

**request_options:** `typing.Optional[RequestOptions]` — Request-specific configuration.
    
</dd>
</dl>
</dd>
</dl>


</dd>
</dl>
</details>
